allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\aaron.lavespere\\Desktop\\Evernote Files" -Recurse | Select-Object FullName, Extension, @{N='SizeKB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($files = Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\aaron.lavespere\\Desktop\\Evernote Files"; Write-Host "Total files: $\($files.Count\)"; $files | Group-Object Extension | Sort-Object Count -Descending | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\)" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\aaron.lavespere\\Documents\\Aaron's Life & Business OS\\Brokerage\\" -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Extension -in @\('.db', '.sqlite', '.csv', '.json'\)} | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName })
